display.purpose: Brand logotype on the landing page. One use in the entire product.

headline.purpose: Page titles, section headers, profile usernames.

title.purpose: Card headings, post titles, list entry points.

body.purpose: All prose content. Max 65–75ch line length.

label.purpose: Form eyebrows, stat captions, section labels. Always uppercase + wide-tracked.

shadows.name: ambient-modal
shadows.purpose: Exclusive to modal dialogs (SearchModal, FiltroPanel). Never on cards, inputs, or nav elements.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions. Exponential ease-out — no bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: ease-micro
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: button hover, border color shifts, color transitions.

motion.name: ease-enter
motion.purpose: Component enter transitions (modal open, panel slide-in).

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Small mobile — avatar grid wraps, compact padding.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Primary mobile/desktop breakpoint — navbar collapses, landing grid stacks.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Wide layout — progreso sidebar becomes sticky.

breakpoints.name: xl
breakpoints.purpose: Max content width for navbar and page containers.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pill-shaped primary action. Used for publish (foro), login, and submit actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 7px 18px; background: #1f387e; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #162d4a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary surface action. Used for Foro and Armador de Horarios landing links.
components.html: Foro
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 10px 20px; background: #ffffff; color: #1f387e; border: 1.5px solid #d0d9f0; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.18s, border-color 0.18s; width: 100%; max-width: 280px; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f0f4ff; border-color: #7b93d8; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 12px; }

components.name: Filter Tag — Active
components.description: Selected state of cascade-navigation pills (Carrera, Año, Materia, post type filters).
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 9px 22px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tag--active { background: #1f387e; color: #ffffff; border: 1.5px solid #1f387e; } .ds-tag--active:hover { background: #162d4a; border-color: #162d4a; } .ds-tag--inactive { background: #fafaf8; color: #1f387e; border: 1.5px solid #e8e8e4; } .ds-tag--inactive:hover { border-color: #a0b0d8; } .ds-tag:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Filter Tag — Inactive
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 9px 22px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tag--inactive { background: #fafaf8; color: #1f387e; border: 1.5px solid #e8e8e4; } .ds-tag--inactive:hover { border-color: #a0b0d8; background: #f5f7fd; } .ds-tag:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard labeled text input for upload forms and foro post creation.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-field__label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #374151; } .ds-input { border: 1.5px solid #e8e8e4; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; color: #111827; background: #ffffff; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #1f387e; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.6; background: #fafaf8; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Fixed 56px top navigation with brand logotype, page links, and auth controls.
components.html:
TUTN
  • Foro
  • Subir material
  • Progreso
components.css: .ds-navbar { position: sticky; top: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 24px; height: 56px; background: #ffffff; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e4; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; gap: 16px; } .ds-navbar__brand { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: #111827; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.03em; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-navbar__links { display: flex; gap: 32px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-navbar__link { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #374151; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-navbar__link:hover { color: #1f387e; } .ds-navbar__link--active { color: #1f387e; } .ds-navbar__link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Vote Control
components.description: Foro voting interface: upvote/downvote buttons flanking a live score. Signature component.
components.html: 12
components.css: .ds-vote { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; min-width: 32px; } .ds-vote__btn { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; background: transparent; border: none; color: #878a8c; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-vote__btn:hover { background: #f0f0ee; color: #374151; } .ds-vote__btn--up[aria-pressed='true'] { color: #1f387e; } .ds-vote__btn--down[aria-pressed='true'] { color: #e05555; } .ds-vote__btn:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-vote__btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-vote__score { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; color: #878a8c; line-height: 1; min-width: 16px; text-align: center; } .ds-vote__score--positive { color: #1f387e; } .ds-vote__score--negative { color: #e05555; }

components.name: File Result Card
components.description: Material search result: shows file type badge, name, star rating, download count, and action buttons.
components.html:
Resumen15 mar 2026

Completo, con ejercicios resueltos de la práctica 3 y 4.

Descargas: 47
Ver
components.css: .ds-file-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e8e8e4; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-file-card__head { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-file-card__badge { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-file-card__badge--resumen { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; } .ds-file-card__badge--parcial { background: #ffedd5; color: #c2410c; } .ds-file-card__badge--tp { background: #dcfce7; color: #15803d; } .ds-file-card__date { font-size: 12px; color: #9ca3af; } .ds-file-card__name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; margin: 0; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-file-card__desc { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; margin: 0; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-file-card__footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-file-card__dl { font-size: 12px; color: #9ca3af; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-file-card__actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-file-card__action { font-size: 12px; padding: 6px 12px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; color: #374151; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-file-card__action:hover { background: #f9fafb; } .sr-only { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); white-space: nowrap; border: 0; }

narrative.northStar: La Guía Definitiva de la Facultad
narrative.overview:
TUTN is built on the metaphor of the definitive handbook: the well-indexed, dog-eared guide that students pass between themselves because it actually has the answers. Not the official syllabus nobody reads, not a consumer app dressed up in a university logo. A reliable reference that respects the user's time and intelligence.

The interface is information-first. Density is a virtue when it means less clicking, not more clutter. Every element either helps a student find something or gets out of the way. The palette is restrained: one deep blue anchors trust, everything else is paper and ink. Decoration earns its place by serving function.

The voice is Argentine: direct, informal, voseo throughout. The app speaks like the student next to you who actually knows the campus, not like an institution trying to sound approachable.
keyCharacteristics: Azul Pizarrón is the single trust anchor; everything else is near-neutral
Paper-toned backgrounds reduce eye strain during long study sessions
Flat elevation: borders divide space, shadows are reserved for modal overlays
Pill-shaped tags for multi-select cascades; radius shrinks as components grow in visual weight
Dense but breathable layout — rhythm through varied spacing, not uniform padding

rules.name: La Regla del Único Acento
rules.body: Azul Pizarrón is the only color that appears statically on more than 10% of any surface. Birome Turquesa lives only in motion. If you're adding a second static accent, you're adding noise to a system built on restraint.

rules.name: La Regla del Papel
rules.body: Backgrounds are warm off-whites, never pure #ffffff at the page level. Pure white is reserved for elevated surfaces. The contrast between Papel Cuadriculado and Blanco Limpio creates tonal depth without shadows.

rules.name: La Regla del Pizarrón
rules.body: Labels and eyebrows are always uppercase with wide tracking (0.07–0.1em). This is the one place all-caps is permitted. Body text, headings, and buttons are never all-caps.

rules.name: La Regla de la Línea
rules.body: Prose content is capped at 65–75 characters per line. The container constrains itself on wide screens; the line never stretches full-width.

rules.name: La Regla Plana
rules.body: If a surface is not a modal, it does not get a shadow. Tonal color shifts handle depth at page level. Borders handle depth at component level.

dos: Do use Azul Pizarrón as the single accent. Its rarity on a given surface is what makes it trustworthy.
Do use pill-shaped buttons (border-radius: 9999px) for primary in-page actions only.
Do write labels, form eyebrows, and stat captions in uppercase with wide tracking (0.07–0.1em). This is the only permitted use of all-caps.
Do differentiate surface depth with color tones, not shadows.
Do write in voseo: Iniciá sesión, Buscás, Subí material, Elegí tu avatar. The interface is Argentine, always.
Do keep body text under 70ch per line.
Do use border: 1px solid #e8e8e4 as the primary spatial separator.
Do animate only transform, opacity, and color. Never animate width, height, top, left, or padding.
Do include aria-live + aria-atomic on any value that updates without user action.
donts: Don't use gradients on hero sections, button backgrounds, or cards. This is the most visible tell of the anti-reference: estética SaaS genérica de Silicon Valley.
Don't build 2×2 grids of identical cards with big numbers and uppercase labels. This is the banned hero-metric template.
Don't add a second static saturated accent color. Birome Turquesa is for motion only.
Don't add box-shadow to anything that is not a modal overlay.
Don't imitate Coursera, Moodle, or apps universitarias argentinas oficiales.
Don't use all-caps for buttons, headings, or body copy. Label role only.
Don't use window.confirm() or alert() for user-facing feedback.
Don't apply the Display scale (800 weight, clamp 4–6rem) to anything other than the brand logotype.
